hooks.command: jq -n --arg d "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" '{"systemMessage": "Session \($d) — codeflash marketing site. All CTAs must point to the live flashcards app URL. Pricing must match flashcards-programming-app exactly."}'

out=$(bash $HOME/dev/ai-brain/scripts/session-start-check.sh codeflash 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg m "$out" '{"systemMessage": ("Unapplied ADR entries affecting codeflash:\n\n" + $m)}'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage": "Before compacting: preserve (1) current branch name and any uncommitted file paths, (2) any pricing or CTA changes in progress, (3) what was accomplished and what still remains open."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Turn complete — verify: tests pass · no PII in diff · if context feels slow, /compact with a summary hint before the next task."}'
